ab: matawalay ako a miala ko codad.
en: I forgot to bring the textbook.

ab: matawalay ako a miala ko tanengnengan.
malacafay kako i tisowanan a minengneng.
en: I will share it with you.

ab: matawalay ako a miala ko sararop.
en: I forgot to bring the eraser.

ab: matawalay ako a miala ko sasipasip.
pacaliwen ako kiso.
en: I can lend you.

ab: matawalay iso a miala ko impic han?
en: Do you forget to bring your pen?

ab: Hai, pacaliwen ho kako to impic iso manga’ay to haw?
en: Yes, can you lend me a pen?

ab: o manan ko kakaenen no miso a sakalahok?
en: What would you like for lunch?\\n8.

ab: o ^pang ko kakaenen no mako.
en: I want some bread.

ab: o manan ko kakaenen no miso a sakalafi?
en: What would you like for dinner?

ab: komaen kako to holo.
en: I want some rice.

ab: komaen kako to hemay.
o holo ko kakaenen no mako.
o hemay ko kakaenen no mako.
o manan ko mikaenan no miso a sakaranam?
en: What did you have for breakfast?

ab: o fita’ol ko mikaenan no mako.
en: I ate an egg.

ab: o manan ko mikaenan no miso a sakalahok?
en: What did you have for lunch?

ab: o titi no koko’ ko mikaenan no mako.
en: I ate the chicken.

ab: misalama kami to mali.
en: Let’s play soccer.

ab: ’ayaw to kiso a tayra, kilim han to ako kiso ano honi.
ch: B:你先去，我等一下去找你。
en: You go first and I will catch up later.

ab: midangoy kami.
en: Let’s go swimming.

ab: Hayda, malacafay kita a tayra.
en: Sure! Let’s go there together.

ab: mimali kami.
en: Let’s play ball.

ab: Naay, micolo’ ho kami to codad.
en: No, we have to carry books first.

ab: mi’ora’oray to kiso?
en: Did you brush your teeth?

ab: miri’iway to kiso?
caho, mifanaway ho kako to kaysing.
en: Not yet. I am doing the dishes.

ab: mi’ora’oray to kiso?
en: Did you rinse out your mouth?

ab: mi’ora’oray to kako.
en: Yes, I rinsed out my mouth.

ab: mifanawan to iso ko kaysing han?
en: I already washed the dishes.

ab: mafanaway to ako ko kaysing no mako.
en: I already washed the dishes.

ab: mana ca kapinanaw kiso to kamay?
en: Why didn’t you wash your hands?

ab: mananaw to kako ano honi.
en: I will wash my hands later.

ab: nimaanay kiso ihoni?
en: What were you doing just now?

ab: mikilimay kako to singsi.
en: I went to meet the teacher.

ab: wa mimaan kiso ano minoky nani pitilidan?
en: What are you going to do after school?

ab: tangsol sa kako a minokay.
en: I will go home directly.

ab: wa mimaan cingra ano minokay nani pitilidan?
en: What is she doing after school?

ab: wa mamakero cingra.
en: She is going to go dancing.
